description: Living manifestations of the primal elements — fire, water, earth, air, and their hybrid forms.
creatures: Fire Elemental
A roaring pillar of living flame that sets everything it touches ablaze and leaves scorched earth behind.
Water Elemental
A surging column of water that crashes forward with tidal force, drowning anything in its path.
Earth Elemental
A grinding mass of stone and soil that rises from the ground and hammers with boulder fists.
Air Elemental
A screaming vortex of wind that hurls debris and rips the breath from lungs.
Ice Elemental
A jagged, crystalline figure that freezes the air around it and leaves killing frost in its wake.
Lightning Elemental
A blinding, crackling arc of living electricity that leaps between targets in searing chains.
Magma Elemental
A lurching mass of molten rock that drips lava and sets stone floors glowing cherry-red.
Mud Elemental
A sucking, heaving mound of wet earth that engulfs victims and slowly suffocates them.
Steam Elemental
A billowing cloud of scalding vapor that blisters skin and fills rooms with blinding haze.
Dust Elemental
A choking, swirling column of grit and sand that scours flesh and blinds eyes.
Salamander
A serpentine, flame-wreathed lizard that coils in lava pools and wields a white-hot spear.
Undine
A luminous water spirit with flowing hair that heals wounds with a touch of cool rain.
Sylph
A nearly invisible wind spirit whose laughter sounds like chimes and whose breath stirs storms.
Gnome
A small, stony-skinned burrower that knows every gem vein and hidden tunnel in the deep earth.
